title: 8 Herbal Creams For Colds
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra creams contains active constituents like glycyrrhizin, flavonoids, and saponins. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce swelling and congestion in the nasal passages, making it easier to breathe when you have a cold. Glycyrrhizin also has a soothing effect on the throat, which can help to ease a sore throat and cough. The flavonoids in Glycyrrhiza glabra creams have antioxidant properties that can help to protect against oxidative stres...
